title: dichanthelium chamaelonche subsp. breve
intro: Dichanthelium chamaelonche subsp. breve is a subspecies of grass native to North America, belonging to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Dichanthelium chamaelonche subsp. breve include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy among indigenous communities. Traditional herbal preparations involve infusing the plant in hot water to make a tea, or using it in salves and poultices to apply topically for skin issues.
